transcript:
CALLER: Hello, mujhe jaanna tha ki aap Star Health ka insurance accept karte ho?
AGENT: Haan, bilkul. Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic Star Health Insurance ke saath empanelled hai. Aap cashless facility ka bhi use kar sakte hain.
CALLER: Oh achha. Toh main kal admit hone wala hoon, umm, knee replacement ke liye. Kya documents laane padenge?
AGENT: Aapko original insurance card, photo ID, aur doctor ka referral letter laana hoga. Admission ke waqt humara TPA desk pre-authorization form fill karne mein help karega.
CALLER: Pre-authorization kitne time mein hoti hai usually?
AGENT: Zyaadatar cases mein 2 se 4 ghante lagte hain. Agar aap subah 8 baje tak aa jaate hain toh din mein hi approve ho jaata hai.
CALLER: Theek hai, mera naam Suresh Nair hai by the way.
AGENT: Thank you Mr. Nair. Koi aur sawaal ho toh zaroor poochiye. Kal aane par humara insurance desk ground floor par milega, right side mein.
CALLER: Bahut shukriya, bahut helpful tha.
AGENT: Aapka swagat hai. Apna khayal rakhiye!
